title: Getting Around
description: Buses, trams, taxis and how to buy tickets

rows.label: Trolleybus
rows.english: Trolleybus (electric bus on overhead wires — very common in Slovakia)

rows.label: Night bus
rows.english: Night bus (runs after midnight when regular service stops)

rows.label: Direction
rows.english: Direction / Towards (shown on the front of the vehicle)

rows.label: Train station
rows.english: Train station (also called Hlavná stanica = Main Station)

rows.label: Terminal
rows.english: Last stop / Terminal (end of the line)

rows.label: Platform
rows.english: Platform / Bay (at a bus or train station)

rows.label: Transfer
rows.english: Transfer — changing to another bus, tram or trolleybus

rows.label: Validator
rows.english: Ticket validator — the yellow machine on board. ALWAYS stamp your ticket when boarding!

rows.label: Fine
rows.english: Fine (for travelling without a valid stamped ticket)

rows.label: Right bus
rows.english: Which bus goes to the city centre?

words.english: Which bus goes to the city centre?

scenarios.situation: You just boarded a tram in Bratislava. There is a yellow machine on a pole near the door. What must you do?
choices: Ignore it — your ticket is already valid
Stamp your ticket in the kompostér
Show your ticket to the driver
Buy a new ticket from it
scenarios.answer: Stamp your ticket in the kompostér
scenarios.answerMeaning: Kompostér = ticket validator. In Slovakia you MUST stamp your ticket when boarding, even if you already paid. Travelling with an unstamped ticket can result in a pokuta (fine) from a revízor (inspector).

scenarios.situation: Your journey from home to work needs one change — from a bus to a tram. What is the Slovak word for this change?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Prestup = transfer — changing from one bus, tram or trolleybus to another. Check the IMHD app (Bratislava) for the best route and transfer points.

scenarios.situation: You are in a taxi and your destination is just around the corner. What do you say to the driver?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Zastavte tu, prosím = Stop here please. Zastaviť = to stop. Add prosím (please — from Stage 1, Lesson 1) to stay polite with the driver.

scenarios.situation: You need a one-way bus ticket for a single journey. Which ticket do you buy?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Jednorazový lístok = single / one-way ticket. If you use public transport every day, a mesačná karta (monthly pass) saves money. Bratislava tickets are zone-based — make sure you buy the right zóna.

scenarios.situation: A taxi driver asks 'Kam ideme?' What does he want to know?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Kam ideme? = Where are we going? Kam = where to. Answer with 'Zavezite ma na [address], prosím.' — using the address skills from Lesson 1: Know Your Address!

scenarios.situation: You want to ask which tram goes to Hlavná stanica (the main train station). Which phrase is correct?
choices: Ktorá električka ide na Hlavnú stanicu?
scenarios.answer: Ktorá električka ide na Hlavnú stanicu?
scenarios.answerMeaning: Ktorá električka ide na...? = Which tram goes to...? Swap električka for autobus (bus) or trolejbus (trolleybus) depending on what you are looking for.

scenarios.situation: You travel without a valid stamped ticket and a revízor checks you. What do you risk?
choices: A termín at the Foreign Police
scenarios.answerMeaning: Pokuta = fine. In Bratislava the on-the-spot fine for an invalid ticket is currently €50. Always stamp your lístok in the kompostér the moment you board.

scenarios.situation: You are at a bus station and the board shows 'Konečná'. What does this mean for your journey?
choices: This is the last stop — the end of the line
You need to buy a new ticket
scenarios.answer: This is the last stop — the end of the line
scenarios.answerMeaning: Konečná = terminal / last stop / end of the line. If you stay on past your stop and reach the konečná, you will need to catch a bus back in the other direction.

items.translation: Which ___ goes to the city centre?
Do I need to ___? Or does the bus go directly?
Can I pay by ___? I don't have cash.

exercises.scenario: 🚕 You ordered a taxi. The driver calls to confirm and picks you up.

turns.snailMessage: Dobrý deň! Som váš taxík. Kam ideme?
turns.snailMessageEnglish: Good day! I'm your taxi. Where are we going?

choices.slovak: Zavezite ma na Hlavnú stanicu, prosím.
choices.english: Please take me to the Main Station.
I don't know where I'm going.

turns.snailReply: Hlavná stanica — dobre. Je tam dosť premávky, bude to asi dvadsať minút.
turns.snailReplyEnglish: Main Station — alright. There is quite a lot of traffic, it will be about twenty minutes.

choices.slovak: Dobre, to nevadí. Koľko to bude stáť?
choices.english: That's fine. How much will it cost?

choices.slovak: Dvadsať minút? To je príliš dlho!

turns.snailReply: Asi desať eur. Záleží na premávke.
turns.snailReplyEnglish: About ten euros. Depends on the traffic.

choices.english: I want to go by bus.

turns.snailReply: Samozrejme, kartou aj hotovosťou — oboje funguje.
turns.snailReplyEnglish: Of course, by card or cash — both work.

choices.slovak: Ďakujem. Mám vlak o jedenástej — môžeme ísť trochu rýchlejšie?
choices.english: Thank you. I have a train at eleven — can we go a bit faster?

turns.snailReply: Urobím čo môžem! Máte veľa batožiny?
turns.snailReplyEnglish: I'll do what I can! Do you have a lot of luggage?

choices.english: I have one suitcase and a backpack.

turns.snailReply: Dobre. Pomôžem vám s kufrom. Sme takmer na mieste!
turns.snailReplyEnglish: Good. I'll help you with the suitcase. We're almost there!

choices.english: Stop here please — in front of the entrance.

turns.snailReplyEnglish: Stopping. Here we are — Main Station!

choices.slovak: Ďakujem veľmi pekne. Tu je platba kartou.
choices.english: Thank you very much. Here is the payment by card.

turns.snailReply: Platba prijatá. Ďakujem! Dobrú cestu a veľa šťastia so vlakom!
turns.snailReplyEnglish: Payment received. Thank you! Have a good trip and good luck with the train!

choices.english: Can I stay in the taxi?

exercises.scenario: 🚕 Tentoraz len po slovensky! Taxík vás odváža na stanicu.

turns.snailMessage: Dobrý deň! Som váš taxík. Kam ideme?

choices.slovak: Zavezite ma na Hlavnú stanicu, prosím.

turns.snailReply: Hlavná stanica — dobre. Je tam dosť premávky, bude to asi dvadsať minút.

Dvadsať minút? To je príliš dlho!

choices.slovak: Ďakujem. Mám vlak o jedenástej — môžeme ísť trochu rýchlejšie?

turns.snailReply: Urobím čo môžem! Máte veľa batožiny?
Dobre. Pomôžem vám s kufrom. Sme takmer na mieste!
